untranslatable_reason: Head-and-Shoulders pattern requires identification of three distinct peaks (shoulders and head) with specific structural relationships and neckline troughs. The conservative target calculation (formation height subtracted from higher neckline trough) requires multi-bar pattern geometry analysis not directly available in the indicator set. Available indicators cannot reliably detect the formation's distinct shoulder-head-shoulder structure or compute the neckline trough differential. Recommend using a dedicated chart pattern detector or multi-timeframe structure analysis module.
